creative_direction.reasoning: Extreme minimalism — white canvas, 2-line lowercase green headline, 'duolingo' signature, small Duo mascot at bottom. Typography IS the ad. Duo mascot is the only image-gen element; everything else is type and negative space. Track B: generate white canvas + small standing Duo at bottom; overlay headline + wordmark in post.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Radical simplicity for ESL audiences — three words in Duolingo green on white, tiny Duo at bottom.

nano_banana_json.scene: Pure white canvas with a two-line lowercase ExtraBold rounded sans headline 'improve / your english' in Duolingo green, the word 'duolingo' below in a muted gray-green slightly smaller, and Duo the owl mascot standing small at the bottom center with a subtle gray oval shadow.

color_palette.role: tiny gray oval shadow under Duo

composition.layout_archetype: centered vertical stack with heavy negative space
vertical_zones: Top 12-30%: two-line headline 'improve / your english' lowercase, centered
Bottom 60-85%: Duo owl mascot standing, small, centered, with tiny gray oval shadow beneath
Approximately 60% of canvas is empty white space

text_elements_in_image.font: Duolingo Feather Bold (rounded geometric ExtraBold sans)
text_elements_in_image.notes: Lowercase is load-bearing — audience signal for ESL

nano_banana_json.duo_mascot_spec: Full body Duo standing, ~260px tall, green body, big white eyes, orange beak and feet, slightly tilted pose (right foot forward, head slightly turned right as if curious), tiny subtle gray oval shadow under feet (20% opacity).
negative_prompt: no capital letters in headline or wordmark

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate only the white canvas + small standing Duo at bottom. All text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Pure white 1080x1080 canvas. Duo the owl mascot (bright green body, big white eyes, orange triangular beak and feet, flat illustration in Duolingo's house style) standing small (~260px tall) in the bottom-center area (approximately y:65-90%), with a very subtle small gray oval shadow (20% opacity) under his feet. Rest of canvas is empty white space.
negative_prompt: canvas outside of Duo must be blank white

elements.font_family: Duolingo Feather Bold / Nunito Rounded ExtraBold

assets.name: Duo the owl mascot (standing full-body)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Full-body cartoon owl standing: bright green (#58CC02) oval body, big white eyes with black pupils, small orange (#FFA916) triangular beak, tiny orange feet visible, slight head tilt, flat illustration in Duolingo's house style. NO drop shadow except subtle gray oval under feet.

prompt_writer_training_notes: Lowercase is non-negotiable for this ad family — explicitly specify 'lowercase' in text spec or image gen auto-capitalizes. Green hierarchy (#58CC02 saturated for headline vs #89B24B muted for wordmark) creates hierarchy through color, not size difference — rare move. White canvas must be pure #FFFFFF; image gen often drifts to warm off-white which breaks the register. Duo standing pose ~260px at 1080 canvas = small. Explicit size needed to prevent oversize mascot.
